subTitle: Whilst Hiroshi is working, Misae tries to stop Shin-chan from mischievously annoying him. Later, after his work is finished, Hiroshi spends time with Shin-chan.

subTitle: Shin-chan visits the zoo on a school trip where he causes a nuisance and proceeds to annoy the teachers and the captive animals.

subTitle: Shin-chan tries to offer his assistance to Misae in preparing their meals for dinner. However, his participation complicates the situation.

subTitle: When Shin-chan visits a retirement home, he meets a politician. However, Shin-chan ends up asking him embarrassing questions.

subTitle: A man disallows Shin-chan and his friends from entering an area from where cherry blossoms can be observed. Consequently, whilst he is away, the kids gain entry.

subTitle: During a school trip, Shin-chan acts mischievously and pesters Yoshinaga. Later, Shin-chan drops Kazama's handkerchief when they visit the washroom.

subTitle: Shin-chan learns how to stitch fabric and when Misae has fallen asleep, he takes the opportunity to stitch up various garments lying around the household.

subTitle: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: To allow his mother to rest, Shin-chan spends his time playing with Shiro. However, Misae wakes up to find that Shin-chan is sleeping inside Shiro's kennel.

subTitle: Shin-chan and his family visit an art museum and express their opinions on the exhibits loudly without realising that the artist is nearby.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: When Misae makes Shin-chan angry, he leaves the house. However, Misae later brings cakes and Shin-chan promptly returns to try some.

subTitle: Misae inflates an outdoor bath tub during a warm summer day and fills it with water. Later, she, Hiroshi and Shin-chan enjoy a bath in it.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: When Shin-chan gets lost in a crowd, he is reported to the department for lost children where he helps a lost little girl reunite with her mother.

subTitle: Misae comes to learn that an crow has been scattering waste around the premises and tries to chase it. However, Shin-chan tries to help her with dynamite.

subTitle: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Shinchan nohara is a little boy who seems to do everything he can to annoy his parents and teachers (and succeeds wildly), but only means the best. he just tries to have a good time.

subTitle: Shin-chan is taken to a music school by Misae so he can learn music. However, the teacher of the institution leaves Misae upset.

subTitle: When it begins to rain torrentially, Misae quickly moves the clothes to the first floor but forgets to close a tap which leads to flooding.

subTitle: When Misae makes the decision to throw away Shin-chan's toys, Shin-chan tries to hide all of them at Shinobu's house.

subTitle: Misae tries a new approach to deal with Shin-chan and correct his behaviour by appreciating his mischief instead of berating him.

title: Shin Chan: The Kasukabe Wild Kingdom
subTitle: Kasukabe's new mayor, Eco Loco, transforms all residents into animals, urging a return to primal roots. The Nohara family adjusts to new forms, like Misae's cat and Hiroshi's rooster.

title: Sudha Murty's Stories of Wit & Magic
subTitle: Shin-chan brushes his teeth with new toothpaste and eats unhealthy snacks right after. As a result, Misae is left infuriated and she berates him.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: In order to make repairs on the broken pipe, Hiroshi climbs on to the roof. However, Shin-chan's incessant mischief causes him to lose his balance.

title: Paap-O-Meter
subTitle: Shin-chan brushes his teeth with new toothpaste and eats unhealthy snacks right after. As a result, Misae is left infuriated and she berates him.

title: Kicko And Super Speedo
subTitle: When it begins to rain torrentially, Misae quickly moves the clothes to the first floor but forgets to close a tap which leads to flooding.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: When Shin-chan barges into the room of a college student to take shelter, she tries to evict him but incurs challenges along the way.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Shin-chan is taken to a music school by Misae so he can learn music. However, the teacher of the institution leaves Misae upset.

title: Sudha Murty's Stories of Wit & Magic
subTitle: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Misae tries a new approach to deal with Shin-chan and correct his behaviour by appreciating his mischief instead of berating him.

title: Guru Aur Bhole
subTitle: Shinchan nohara is a little boy who seems to do everything he can to annoy his parents and teachers (and succeeds wildly), but only means the best. he just tries to have a good time.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: When a cockroach infests the house, Misae asks Shin-chan to help her be rid of it. However, misadventures ensue and the cockroach remains.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Keiko opts to help Shin-chan take some photographs when he gets the chance to pose for a magazine advertisement. However, Shin-chan accidentally breaks her camera.

title: Sudha Murty's Stories of Wit & Magic
subTitle: Misae takes Shin-chan with her to see a movie. However, at the theatre, Shin-chan annoys everyone and consequently, he and Misae are asked to leave.

title: Sudha Murty's Stories of Wit & Magic
subTitle: Danzo is appointed as the leader of the Allied Shinobi Forces much to the dismay of the 'Raikage'. Meanwhile, Shikamaru and the rest of the Konoha 11 are given the order to eliminate Sasuke.

title: Paap-O-Meter
subTitle: Naruto, Yamato and Kakashi try to attack Tobi but all the attacks go right through him. Meanwhile at the summit, Danzo's 'genjutsu' is dispelled and everyone splits up to capture Sasuke.

title: Kicko And Super Speedo
subTitle: Naruto, Yamato and Kakashi are shocked by Madara's explanation of the rivalry between Itachi and Sasuke. Meanwhile at the summit, Sasuke and the 'Raikage' have a deadly showdown.

title: Sudha Murty's Stories of Wit & Magic
subTitle: After his 'Susanoo' is fully formed, Sasuke rushes to find and kill Danzo. But just as he enters the conference room, he is attacked by the five 'kages'.
